summary: Verified the WhatsApp phone-number typo fix in /app/backend/mailer.py. The old number '+91 98920 39293' has been replaced with '+91 89203 92937' in exactly the two customer acknowledgement templates (ack_customer_contact, line 170; ack_customer_inquiry, line 239). Ran the full /app/backend/tests/test_mailer.py suite: 15/15 passed. Directly invoked both ack functions with mailer._dispatch monkeypatched and confirmed the rendered HTML contains the NEW number and does NOT contain the OLD number. Admin templates untouched. git diff --stat shows only backend/mailer.py with 2 insertions / 2 deletions (no other tracked files changed).
critical_code_review_comments: Scope of change is minimal and correct: only two string literals in the customer-facing ack templates were updated.
Admin templates (notify_admin_contact, notify_admin_inquiry, notify_admin_pending_review) intentionally do not contain any phone number and were untouched, as required.
No secrets, .env, or unrelated files inspected/modified.
test_credentials: None required — all tests use monkeypatched mailer._dispatch, zero network calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 was a directed one-file typo verification. Scope was strictly limited to /app/backend/tests/test_mailer.py (15 tests) plus grep/inspection of mailer.py. No frontend testing performed (explicitly out of scope). Untracked files present in working tree: frontend/yarn.lock, yarn.lock — these are not part of this change and were left as-is.
